violations.description: CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): A few boxes of food noted on floor inside walkin cooler subject to moisture
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Can opener not properly maintained needs routine cleaning. Pop gun drain behind bar noted in need of cleaning.
SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Single service products noted being stored on floor.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Ceiling fans in restrooms need cleaning.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Flour bins noted not properly labeled.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): One ceiling tile noted missing in mens restroom needs install. Ceiling fans in both restrooms need cleaning.

NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Bottom-inside one reachin freezer in prep area needs cleaning. Floor fan in prep arfea needs cleaning. Interior of Everest cooler behind bar used for cold glasses needs cleaning.
SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Some boxes of single-service items such as pizza boxes and cups noted being stored on floor.
